perturbation.original_text: ____________________ , agrees that, in consideration for being shown or told about certain trade secrets or property belonging to Navidec, Incorporated, ____________________, shall not disclose or cause to be disclosed, disseminated or distributed any information concerning said trade secret or property to any person, entity, business or other individual or company without the prior written permission of Navidec, Incorporated.
perturbation.changed_text: ____________________ , agrees that, in consideration for being shown or told about certain trade secrets or property belonging to Navidec, Incorporated, ____________________, shall not disclose or cause to be disclosed, disseminated or distributed any information concerning said trade secret or property to any person, entity, business or other individual or company without the prior written permission of Navidec, Incorporated. However, disclosure is permitted to legal counsel and financial advisors.
perturbation.explanation: This modification introduces a direct contradiction to the non-disclosure obligation. The original text strictly prohibits disclosure without prior written permission, while the altered text allows disclosure to legal counsel and financial advisors without specifying if written permission is still necessary. This causes confusion about the extent of the non-disclosure obligation and opens the door to potential legal disputes. The contradiction creates an exception where previously there was none.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ____________________ , agrees that, in consideration for being shown or told about certain trade secrets or property belonging to Navidec, Incorporated, ____________________, shall not disclose or cause to be disclosed, disseminated or distributed any information concerning said trade secret or property to any person, entity, business or other individual or company without the prior written permission of Navidec, Incorporated. However, disclosure is permitted to legal counsel and financial advisors. Further, ___________________ , agrees not to use, either directly or indirectly any of the material, ideas, objects or portions thereof of said trade secret or property disclosed by Navidec, Incorporated in any manner whatsoever without the prior written consent of Navidec, Incorporated.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces an exception to the non-disclosure agreement by permitting disclosure to legal counsel and financial advisors. This directly contradicts the original text and the contradicted text, which states that no information concerning trade secrets or property shall be disclosed without prior written permission from Navidec, Incorporated. The addition creates a clear conflict, as disclosure is now allowed in certain circumstances without the previously required written permission. This aligns with the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: In consideration of the mutual promises made herein, as well as the agreement between Navidec, Incorporated and _______________ , the parties hereby agree as follows:
perturbation.changed_text: In consideration of the mutual promises made herein, excluding any prior agreements between Navidec, Incorporated and _______________ , the parties hereby agree as follows:
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction concerning what constitutes the consideration for the agreement. The original text includes 'the agreement between Navidec, Incorporated and _______________' as part of the consideration. However, the revised text explicitly excludes any prior agreements between the two parties from being considered as consideration. If other sections of the contract rely on prior agreements between the parties, this modification may significantly change the effect of the agreement, potentially leading to disputes and rendering parts of the contract unenforceable. It is unclear if prior agreements are voided or still stand in conjunction, causing confusion.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In consideration of the mutual promises made herein, excluding any prior agreements between Navidec, Incorporated and _______________ , the parties hereby agree as follows: ____________________ , agrees that, in consideration for being shown or told about certain trade secrets or property belonging to Navidec, Incorporated, ____________________, shall not disclose or cause to be disclosed, disseminated or distributed any information concerning said trade secret or property to any person, entity, business or other individual or company without the prior written permission of Navidec, Incorporated.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly excludes any prior agreements from the consideration of the present agreement, while the contradicted text directly uses the phrase 'In consideration of the mutual promises made herein, excluding any prior agreements between Navidec, Incorporated and _______________ , the parties hereby agree as follows' to introduce a non-disclosure obligation. This means the very basis of the non-disclosure agreement (consideration) is linked to something that the changed text excludes. Therefore, the changed text creates a direct contradiction by undermining the foundation of the obligation stated in the contradicted text.
